title: oops on ipmi_msghandler removal for non ipmi systems
description:
On a system *without* ipmi:
- modprobe ipmi_si (it'll load also ipmi_msghandler)
- the ipmi_si module returns of course -ENODEV
- rmmod ipmi_msghandler
- watch the kernel oopsing

The cause of this bug is a forgotten step in the error path. The ipmi_si module
never calls driver_unregister in his error path. 
A fix will be provided in the next comment :)
